ideation: This sequence animates a robot raising a beer mug in a celebratory toast.  The right arm will perform the primary action, while the left arm will provide balance and support. I will use the two joints of the robot arm to create smooth yet distinct movements. The sequence will start with both arms relaxed, then move to lifting, and finally to a slight celebratory tilt. The sequence will conclude with a return to the relaxed state.  The robot does not have a hand, so the mug will be positioned as if it is held in a claw-like grip.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, mug held loosely
right arm lifts the mug, left arm balances
raising the mug higher, a slight celebratory tilt
arms return to rest, the toast is complete
